      "text": "weenu tsgreeftu Elka Bildi/ ko

fazzijs: Schinnî Namnâ un
Jerusaleme/ ko es no wiﬀahm
Israëta Ziltim efimu iſwehlejs/
eczelschu es mannu Wahrdnu
mubſchigi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un es ne liſſchu waŗs J-
sraëta Rahju kuſteht no tahs
Gemuus/ ko es juhtu Tehweem
nolizzis-efmu/ ja tee to wiﬀu tur-
rehs un darrihs/ ko es teem ef-
mu pawehlejs/ pehz wiﬀas
Bauslibas/ un Eikumeem/ un
Teesahn/ zaur Mohsus Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Ta darrija Manaſſus Juh-
du un Jerusalemes Gedſhwota-
jns maldiht/ ka tee niknaki dar-
rija/ ne ka tee Vagani/ ko tas
KUNGS to Israëta Behrnu
Preeſchâ bij tsdeldejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Gann tas KUNGSrun-
naja us Manaffu/ un us wiꞥ-
na Landim/ bet tee ne xehme
wehrâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Tapehz wedde tas KUNGS
pahr teem tohs Karra Wirynee-
kus/ kas tam Rehnixam no Affi-
rijas peederreja/ tee apzeetinaja
Manaſſu ar Pinnekkeem/ un teh-
je wiꞥſch ar diwi warra Schke-
dehtm/ un nowedde to us Babeli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Kad nu wiꞥſch ta apbeh-
dinahts tappe/ tad peeſuhdse
wiꞥſch to KUNGSU farwu Dee-
wu/ un paſennnojahs fohti
preeſsch farwo Tehwo Deewu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Un wiꞥſch luhdse to, Un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tas likkahs no wiꞥſch pee
tees/ un paklaufija wiꞥſcha
gn Luhgſchann/ un wedde t
kat us Jerusalemi wiꞥſch W
bu/ tad atsinne Manaſſu
tas KUNGS Deews irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Un pehz to uſtaifija w
to Muhri Ahrapuffê pee
wida Pilsfahta/ Gionain
Uppes prett Wakkarapufft/
tai Weetai/ fur Sinju-W
tis ee-eet/ un apkahrt Owelu
darrija to fohti augstu/ un
arridsan Karra Wirfneekus
fôs ſtiprds Pilsfahtôs Juhi
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un wiꞥſch nopol
tohs ſweſchus Deewus/ un
Bildes no ta KUNGA D
ma/ ar wiﬀeem Altareem
wiꞥſch us ta KUNGA Ma-
Kalnu un Jerusaleme bij u
ſijs/ un mette tohs no Pils-
ahra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un wiꞥſch pataifij
KUNGA Altari/ un upp-
us to Pateikſchanas-Uppue-
Teikſchanas-Uppurus / un
wehleja Juhdam/ ka teem
tam KUNGAM Israëta
wan kalpoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Tatichu tee Landis
uppureja us teem Augſtum-
jeſchu tam KUNGAM
wan Deewam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Un kas weht no Ma-
fus Leetahm ateek/ un wi-
Luhgſchann us fawu Deewu-
to Redjetaju Wahrdi/ kas-
wiꞥſch runnajſchi eekſch ta Ki-
GA Israëta Deewa Wah-
ra
